trigger: Build a new skill for analyzing convertible bond pricing
expected_behavior: Route to domain-expert for scoping, then skill-writer for SKILL.md creation, then eval-runner for testing

trigger: Create a new insurance vertical with underwriting and claims skills
expected_behavior: Route to domain-expert for vertical scoping, then scaffolder for structure, then skill-writer for each skill

trigger: Evaluate the pitch-agent and tell me how it performs
expected_behavior: Route to eval-runner for benchmarking, then domain-expert for accuracy review, produce consolidated report

trigger: This credit-risk-scorer skill is ready to publish
expected_behavior: Route to publisher for pre-publish checklist, verify eval and compliance gates, create PR

trigger: I need a managed agent for the fund-admin workflow
expected_behavior: Route to scaffolder to create the managed-agent cookbook structure with agent.yaml and subagents
